task_completion.description: Open the initial thesis draft presentation
task_completion.visual_evidence: Presentation software (e.g., LibreOffice Impress) is open showing 'thesis_draft.odp' with multiple slides visible in the left thumbnail pane.

task_completion.description: Change the slide dimensions to 30x20 inches
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Slide Properties' or 'Page Setup' dialog box is visible showing the Width set to 30 inches and Height set to 20 inches, or the slide canvas is visibly changed to a large landscape format.

task_completion.description: Consolidate text from slides 2-5 onto the first slide
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main slide canvas contains text boxes that include the required keywords: 'mental health outcomes', 'longitudinal survey', 'correlation coefficient', and 'policy implications' alongside the original title 'Urban Green Spaces'.
The slide thumbnail pane on the left side of the screen shows exactly 1 slide remaining.

task_completion.description: Save the final poster as research_poster.odp in the correct directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the filename 'research_poster.odp' in '/home/ga/Documents/Presentations/', or the application title bar displays 'research_poster.odp' after saving.

integrity.description: Agent used the presentation software GUI to perform edits
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with LibreOffice Impress (or similar presentation software) menus, dialogs, and canvas, rather than terminal commands modifying the .odp file directly.

integrity.description: Text was genuinely copied and pasted into text boxes
integrity.visual_evidence: The consolidated text appears as editable text elements within the presentation software, not as a single pasted image of the old slides.

integrity.description: Agent used a presentation application, not a text editor or image editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface clearly belongs to a presentation tool (e.g., slide thumbnail pane, presentation toolbars) and not a word processor or photo editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The final poster must be saved as 'research_poster.odp' in /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/. It must have exactly 1 slide with dimensions 30 inches (width) by 20 inches (height). The single slide must contain the following consolidated text keywords: 'Urban Green Spaces', 'mental health outcomes', 'longitudinal survey', 'correlation coefficient', and 'policy implications'.
